text: Hi, I'm a technical recruiter at NorthBridge Labs and came across your profile. We're hiring a fully remote Senior Software Engineer at $220k with no interview panel needed. To move forward, please complete our take-home by cloning our private assessment repo and running the included setup.sh to configure the environment, then message me on Telegram to continue.

Meridian Software is hiring a Senior Software Engineer (remote, US). You'll design and maintain backend services in Go and Python and collaborate across teams. Requirements: 5+ years of experience and a CS degree or equivalent. Apply through our careers page; the process includes a recruiter screen, a technical interview, and a system-design round. We are an equal opportunity employer.

URGENT hiring: Blockchain Engineer for a well-funded crypto startup. Fully remote, $18,000/ month, start immediately. Final step is a paid trial task: download our wallet integration project from the link, run the build script, and screen-share the output. Contact our hiring manager directly at crypto.hiring.team@gmail.com.

BlueHarbor Digital is seeking a Blockchain Engineer to build and audit smart contracts in Solidity. Remote within EU time zones. You should have 3+ years in web3 and strong security fundamentals. Interviews are conducted over video and include a live code review. Submit your application via our official jobs portal.

Work-from-home Data Analyst needed. Earn $4,500/week processing simple spreadsheets. No experience required and no interview. To get started, a one-time onboarding fee of $150 is required for your software license, refundable after your first month.

NorthPeak Retail is hiring a Data Analyst to build dashboards and analyse sales trends in SQL and Tableau. Hybrid role based in Chicago. Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field and 2+ years of experience preferred. Please answer the screening questions and attach your resume when applying.

Remote Customer Service Representative. $35/hour, flexible hours. Once hired we will mail you a check to purchase your home-office equipment from our approved vendor; deposit it and wire the balance back to us. Immediate start, hiring today!

Evergreen Utilities is hiring Customer Service Representatives for our Phoenix contact centre. You'll handle inbound billing questions and resolve account issues. High school diploma required; paid training provided. This role includes a phone screen and an on-site interview. Benefits and shift differentials apply.

Personal Administrative Assistant wanted, remote, $30/hr. First task after onboarding is to purchase several gift cards for client rewards and send the codes; you will be reimbursed with your first paycheck. Reply with your personal email and phone number to begin right away.

Lakeside Property Group seeks an Administrative Assistant for our downtown office. Duties include scheduling, correspondence, and supporting the operations team. Two years of office experience preferred. Apply online and complete the short questionnaire; shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview.

Financial Analyst (remote). Guaranteed $12k/month. We help you get started by depositing funds into your account which you then transfer to our partners minus your commission. No prior finance experience necessary. Message us on WhatsApp to onboard.

Summit Capital Advisors is hiring a Financial Analyst to support portfolio reporting and forecasting. On-site in Boston with hybrid flexibility. CFA progress and 3+ years of experience valued. The interview process includes a case study. We are an equal opportunity employer.

Marketing Coordinator - work from home, $6,000/month for a few hours a day. Selected applicants only need a quick chat over text. A small activation payment secures your starter kit and training materials.

Harbor & Vine, a consumer brand, is hiring a Marketing Coordinator to run email campaigns and social content. Remote-friendly within the US. One to three years of marketing experience and strong writing skills required. Please submit a portfolio and answer the application questions.

Package Processing Agent - work from home. Receive parcels at your address, re-label them using the software we provide, and forward them to the addresses we send. $50 per package, paid weekly. No interview, start tomorrow.

Ironwood Logistics is hiring Warehouse Package Handlers for our Dallas distribution centre. You'll load, scan, and sort parcels on the night shift. Must be able to lift 50 lbs. Paid weekly with overtime available. Apply in person or online; a brief interview is required.

Freelance Graphic Designer needed urgently, $7,500/month, fully remote. Hired on the spot, no portfolio review. To set up your payment account we require your bank login so we can deposit your advance. Contact designer.jobs.hr@gmail.com.

Cobalt Studio is looking for a Graphic Designer to create brand and marketing assets in the Adobe suite. Remote contract with possible extension. Please share a portfolio; the process includes a design exercise and a portfolio review call. Rate depends on experience.

Remote Bookkeeper / Payment Processor. Process incoming client payments through your own personal bank account and forward them to our vendors, keeping 10% as your fee. Flexible, easy, and no experience needed. Immediate openings.

Rivergate Accounting is hiring a Bookkeeper to manage accounts payable/receivable and monthly reconciliations in QuickBooks. On-site in Denver. Two+ years of bookkeeping experience required. Apply through our website and complete the screening questions.
Data Entry Clerk - $38/hour from home, no experience, no interview. Positions filling fast! Send a $95 refundable registration fee via gift card to reserve your spot and receive login details.

Fairfield Medical Group needs a Data Entry Clerk to input patient records accurately into our system. On-site, full-time. Attention to detail and typing speed of 50+ wpm required. Shortlisted applicants complete a short data-entry assessment during the interview.

Remote QA Tester, $95/hr, immediate start. As the final step, please pull our test harness from the private repository we share and execute run_tests.sh locally, then send us the generated report file. Communication will continue over Telegram once you begin.

Tidewater Systems is hiring a QA Engineer to write and run automated tests for our web platform. Remote, US-based. Experience with Selenium or Playwright and 3+ years in QA preferred. The interview includes a technical discussion and a take-home reviewed together over video.

Executive seeks a Personal Assistant, remote, $1,200/week for light tasks. Your first assignment is to buy gift cards for staff appreciation and email the codes; reimbursement follows in your paycheck. Contact me directly at my personal address to start.

Wexford Partners is hiring an Executive Assistant to support a managing director with scheduling, travel, and correspondence. On-site in New York with some remote flexibility. Five years of EA experience required. Please apply online and answer the screening questions.

Hiring Coordinator, work from home, $5,500/month. No experience needed and no formal interview - just a brief text chat. A modest onboarding deposit is required to activate your recruiter portal, fully refundable.

Aspenwood Group is seeking an HR Coordinator to support recruiting logistics and onboarding. Hybrid role in Seattle. One to two years of HR or coordination experience preferred. The process includes a recruiter call and a panel interview. We value a diverse and inclusive workplace.

Remote Sales Rep - earn $15,000/month guaranteed, paid daily. Anyone can do this, no interview and no experience. Just cover the $200 cost of your starter materials and begin earning today. Text us to enroll.

Crestline Media is hiring an Inside Sales Representative to manage outbound leads and close SMB accounts. Remote within the US with a base salary plus commission. One+ year of sales experience preferred. Please apply and complete the short questionnaire.

IT Support Technician, fully remote, $60/hr, start this week. Skip the interview - just provide your bank details for direct deposit and buy a company laptop from our vendor; we reimburse you after onboarding. Reach out on WhatsApp.

Grovepoint Health is hiring an IT Support Technician to provide helpdesk support and manage endpoints on-site at our Austin campus. CompTIA A+ or equivalent and 1+ year of support experience preferred. The interview includes a practical troubleshooting scenario.

Content Writer wanted - $80 per short article, work whenever you like, get hired instantly. To receive assignments, register with a one-time $60 access fee payable by gift card. No samples or interview required.

Maplewood Publishing is looking for a Content Writer to produce blog articles and web copy on finance topics. Remote freelance, paid per piece. Please submit two writing samples; a short paid trial assignment follows for shortlisted writers.

We're hiring a Product Manager, $210k fully remote, and your profile is a great fit - no formal interview required. To assess product sense, please clone the prototype from our private repo and run the local setup script, then walk us through it on Telegram. Moving fast, offer ready this week.

Halcyon Health is hiring a Product Manager to own the roadmap for our patient-facing app. Remote, US-based. Three to five years of PM experience in a regulated domain preferred. The process includes a recruiter screen, a product case, and a cross-functional panel. Equal opportunity employer.
